route53recoveryreadiness.cell.CellName.Docs: The name of the cell to create.

route53recoveryreadiness.cell.Cells.Docs: A list of cell Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) contained within this cell, for use in nested cells. For example, Availability Zones within specific AWS Regions.

route53recoveryreadiness.cell.Tags.Docs: A collection of tags associated with a resource.
